description_long: This object consists of two large, military-style wooden crates stacked on top of each other, accompanied by two smaller metal ammunition boxes placed in front. The crates are painted in a dark olive green color, with visible metal corner reinforcements, latches, and a heavy chain handle on the sides. Faint stenciled Cyrillic writing is present on the front faces of the crates, indicating possible military or industrial use. The smaller boxes have hinged lids and side handles, and also feature stenciled markings. The surfaces of all containers show signs of wear, scratches, and slight weathering, suggesting frequent handling or outdoor storage. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for secure storage and transport of heavy or sensitive items.
description: A set of two large olive green wooden crates with metal reinforcements and stenciled markings, accompanied by two smaller metal ammunition boxes. The containers show signs of wear and are designed for secure storage and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stenciled Cyrillic writing, metal latches, and both small ammunition boxes placed in front of the stacked crates.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the heavy chain handle on the crate and the side profiles of the ammunition boxes, one of which is open.
description_view_2: Rear view of the stacked crates, with no visible markings or handles, and the ammunition boxes mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chain handle and the open lid of one ammunition box, with the other box partially visible.
attribute_lid_type: hinged lid (on small boxes), removable flat lid (on large crates)
attribute_handle_design: side-mounted metal handles and chain handles on large crates, side-mounted metal handles on small boxes
